It has a fleet of 6 chartered vessels and 91 ROVs. Subsea 7 S.A. was incorporated in 1993 and is based in Luxembourg City, Luxembourg.

name: Sunndal Sparebank
summary: Sunndal Sparebank, a savings bank, provides banking products and services for private and corporate customers in Norway. It offers payment and card solutions, such as BankID on mobile, bank cards, credit, mobile and online banking, international payments, Visa cards, and VIPPS; auto, building, holiday home, property, income, UNG, health, children, death fall, critical illness, disability, and other insurance, as well as health policies; car loans, mortgages, loans to other vehicles, and loans and refinancing; and savings and pensions, including share savings accounts, bank savings, BSU, fund savings, IPS, retirement savings, deposits pension, and VPS investor services to private customers. The company provides payment and card solutions, such as bank cards, payment terminals, eGiro/OCR, billing, credit, Web and mobile banking, and other payment services; financing solutions, including bank guarantees, construction loans, overdrafts, leasing, and corporate loans; liability, customer's, cyber, farmhouse agriculture, operating equipment and crop, property, health, landlord, home, craft, car, commercial, personal, travel, goods during transport, and occupational injuries insurance; savings and pensions; and other accounts and services to businesses in construction, property, trade and services, and agriculture industries. The company was founded in 1892 and is based in Sunndals√É¬∏ra, Norway.

name: Surnadal Sparebank
summary: Surnadal Sparebank, an independent savings bank, provides various banking product and services to individuals and businesses in Norway. The company offers savings and pension accounts. It also provides mortgage, car, other vehicles, motor homes/caravans, motorcycles/quads, snowmobiles, construction, and home loans, as well as small loans and refinancing, and bridge financing; bank guarantees; and overdraft services. In addition, the company offers various insurance products, such as home and leisure insurance; liability, customer's, cyber, farm building agriculture, operating tools and crop, property, health, landlord, craft, commercial, personal, travel, large car, goods during transport, and occupational injuries insurance, as well as home insurance agriculture products; vehicle insurance comprising ATV/Quad biking, motorhome, boat, caravan, motorcycle, moped and scooter, private tractor, veteran vehicle, and snowmobile; and other insurance, including horse, and dog and breed cat. Further, it provides mobile, online, and Internet banking services; credit cards; bank cards; overseas payment services; fund savings; mobile payments; and vehicles, machinery, operating equipment, and movable properties leasing services. Additionally, the company offers iZettle, a mobile payment terminal. Surnadal Sparebank was founded in 1842 and is based in Surnadal, Norway. As of April 30, 2021, Surnadal Sparebank operates as a subsidiary of Sparebank 1 Nordvest.

name: Sparebanken Vest
summary: Sparebanken Vest, a financial services company, provides banking and financing services in the counties of Vestland and Rogaland, Norway. It operates through Corporate Market, Retail Market, Bulder Bank, Treasury, and Estate Agency Activities segments. The company is also involved in the estate agency and home mortgage activities. As of December 31, 2020, it had 33 points of sale outlets. The company was founded in 1823 and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.

name: Techstep ASA
summary: Techstep ASA provides digital workplace services in Norway and Sweden. It offers mobile hardware, service, support, and mobility consultancy services; software as a service, as well as mobile expense management modules; and financing and remarketing services. The company also provides industry-leading cloud-based PBX solutions and enterprise mobility management services, including mobile security, system design, implementation, and mobile device management. In addition, it develops and provides enterprise mobility software and solutions for the customers in the transportation, logistics, and public safety sectors. The company is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: TECO 2030 ASA
summary: TECO 2030 ASA, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an engineering and equipment development company for the maritime industry worldwide. It offers TECO Marine Fuel Cell, a modular hydrogen proton exchange membrane fuel cell system primarily designed for heavy-duty marine applications offering emission free propulsion by using hydrogen as fuel; TECO Future Funnel to avoid dry dock; and TECO Ballast Water Treatment System, which is used to prevent invasive species and health issues. The company was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway.

name: Tekna Holding AS
summary: Tekna Holding AS produces and sells spherical powders and nanopowders, and plasma systems for powder production of advanced materials worldwide. Its metal powders and plasma systems are used in various industrial sectors, such as aviation, aerospace, medical, mining and drilling, energy storage and microelectronics. The company is based in Arendal, Norway. Tekna Holding AS is a subsidiary of AFK ASA.

name: Telenor ASA
summary: Telenor ASA, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a telecommunication company worldwide. Its principal products and services include mobile communication, fixed line communication, and broadcasting services. The company's mobile communication services comprise voice, data, Internet, and content services, as well as customer equipment and messaging. Its fixed line services consist of telephony, Internet and TV, and leased lines, as well as data and managed services; and broadcasting and data communication services through satellite, terrestrial radio, and TV transmission. The company also provides machine-to-machine communication, as well as internet based services and financial services. Telenor ASA was founded in 1855 and is headquartered in Fornebu, Norway.

name: Telenor
summary: Telenor ASA is a Norwegian multinational telecommunications company providing mobile, fixed, and broadband services, as well as TV and content services. The company operates in Scandinavia, Eastern Europe, and Asia. Telenor is headquartered in Fornebu, Norway.

name: TGS ASA
summary: TGS-NOPEC Geophysical Company ASA provides geoscience data products and services to the oil and gas industry worldwide. The company offers geophysical multi-client data, including seismic data; and geophysical library, such as gravity, magnetic, seep, geothermal, controlled source electromagnetic, and multibeam data. It also provides geological services comprising digital well logs; and interpretation products and data integration solutions. In addition, the company offers imaging services, which include depth and time imaging; marine, land, and ocean bottom cables and nodes; anisotropic imaging; transition zone processing; multi component processing; shear wave; and 4D time-lapse, as well as wide azimuth data processing. Further, it provides data and analytics solutions; and PRIMA, a multi-function exploration software suite. TGS-NOPEC Geophysical Company ASA has a strategic collaboration with Schlumberger Limited for Ocean Bottom Node Projects in North Sea; and CGG, and PGS ASA to offer a shared ecosystem providing direct access to subsurface multi-client data libraries. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: TGS-NOPEC Geophysical Company
summary: TGS ASA is a global provider of geophysical data and services to the oil and gas industry. They specialize in acquiring, processing, and analyzing seismic data to help energy companies explore for and develop oil and gas resources. The company is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Thin Film Electronics ASA
summary: Thin Film Electronics ASA designs, develops, and produces ultrathin energy storage solutions for wearable devices, connected sensors, and other applications. Its solid-state lithium battery technology enables it to produce rechargeable batteries with high energy densities and long product lifetimes. The company was founded in 2005 is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Thin Film Electronics ASA
summary: Thin Film Electronics ASA (Thinfilm) was a Norwegian company that developed printed electronics, including memory and NFC solutions. The company aimed to create low-cost, flexible, and scalable solutions for various applications. Thinfilm was headquartered in Oslo, Norway, before its delisting and restructuring.

name: TietoEVRY Oyj
summary: TietoEVRY Oyj operates as a software and services company. It operates through six segments: Digital Consulting, Cloud & Infra, Industry Software, Financial Services Solutions, International Operations, and Product Development Services. The Digital Consulting segment offers consulting services, including business and technology advisory, as well as system integration and managed application services. The Cloud & Infra segment provides automated solutions, which include managed cloud, security, and end-user services, as well as cloud migration advisory and transformation services. The Industry Software segment provides with industry-specific software products for business-critical processes of clients in the public and healthcare, and welfare sectors, as well as in the forest industry, and energy and oil and gas segments. The Financial Services Solutions segment offers real-time solution in the areas of payments, cards, wealth management, and credit, as well as BPO services. The Product Development Services segment offers software R&D services with a focus on the telecom sector, as well as new domains, such as automotive serving the communications infrastructure, consumer electronics, and semiconductor companies, and the automotive industry. The company also provides software advisory and consulting services, and industry specific software; and engages in the design, implementation, and maintenance of customized solutions and IT operations. It operates in Finland, Sweden, Norway, Austria, the Baltic countries, Russia, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Tieto Oyj and changed its name to TietoEVRY Oyj in December 2019. TietoEVRY Oyj was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Espoo, Finland.

name: Tomra Systems ASA
summary: Tomra Systems ASA provides sensor-based solutions for optimal resource productivity worldwide. It operates through three divisions: Collection Solutions, Recycling Mining, and Food Solutions. The Collection Solutions division engages in the development, production, rental, sale, and service of reverse vending machines and related data management systems. This segment is also involved in picking up, transporting, and processing empty beverage containers on behalf of beverage producers/fillers. The Recycling Mining division offers sorting systems for waste and metal material streams; and ore sorting systems for the mining industry. The Food Solutions division provides sorting and processing technology for the fresh and processed food industries. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Asker, Norway.

name: Tomra Systems
summary: Tomra Systems ASA develops, manufactures, and sells sensor-based solutions for optimal resource productivity. The company operates through collection solutions (reverse vending machines) and sorting solutions (recycling, mining and food). Tomra is headquartered in Asker, Norway.

name: Totens Sparebank
summary: Totens Sparebank provides various banking and financial products and services in Norway. The company offers savings and pension products; business and construction loans; leasing; overdrafts and bank guarantees; liability, business, data attack, property damage, craftsman, health, homeowners, collective, personnel, travel, occupational injury, agriculture, and vehicle insurance; and business and credit cards. It also provides online and mobile banking services; payment solutions; asset management; and real estate services. The company operates through five offices located in Lena, Raufoss, Gj√É¬∏vik, Hamar, and R√É¬•holt. Totens Sparebank was founded in 1854 and is headquartered in Lena, Norway.

name: Treasure ASA
summary: Treasure ASA, through its 11% interest in Hyundai Glovis Co. Ltd., provides transportation and logistics services in South Korea. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Lysaker, Norway. Treasure ASA is a subsidiary of Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA.

name: Targovax ASA
summary: Targovax ASA, a clinical stage immuno-oncology company, engages in the development of immune activators to target hard-to-treat solid tumors. Its lead product candidate is ONCOS-102, which is in Phase I/II clinical studies for the treatment of mesothelioma, melanoma, and colorectal cancer. The company is also developing neoantigen cancer vaccines targeting tumors with oncogenic RAS√Ç¬ñmutations. In addition, it is developing ONCOS-211 for next generation ONCOS viruses. The company has collaboration agreements with Cancer Research Institute and Ludwig Cancer Research to develop ONCOS-102 for colorectal cancer with peritoneal carcinomatosis; Valo Therapeutics to develop mutant RAS neoantigen coating of ONCOS viruses using PeptiCRAd technology; and Papyrus Therapeutics to develop novel ONCOS viruses with Receptor Tyrosine Kinase inhibitor functionality. Targovax ASA was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Lysaker, Norway.

name: Tysnes Sparebank
summary: Tysnes Sparebank, a savings bank, provides banking products and services for private and business customers in Tysness and surrounding areas. It offers payment solutions, such as bank cards, credits, and mobile and online banking; insurance solutions, such as children, auto, death fall, health, buildings, holiday home, income, critical health, disability, and other insurance; loans, such as car loans, mortgages, loans to other vehicles, credit lines, and small loans; and share savings accounts, bank savings, BSU, fund savings, IPS, and retirement savings and pension accounts to private customers. The company also provides payment solutions, billing services, and Web and mobile banking services; financing services, such as bank guarantees, overdrafts, leasing, and corporate loans; liability, operational agriculture, property, health, home insurance, breeding and crew, car, and occupational insurance; and other accounts to companies in construction, property, trade and services, and agricultural industries. The company was incorporated in 1862 and is headquartered in Tysnes, Norway branches in Kvinnherad, Bergen, Odda, and Stord.

name: Ultimovacs ASA
summary: Ultimovacs ASA, a pharmaceutical company, develops immunotherapies for various cancers. The company engages in performing a clinical development program with clinical trials in Europe and the United States. Its lead product candidate is UV1, a peptide-based vaccine, which completed Phase I clinical trial that induces T cell response against the universal cancer antigen telomerase. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Ultimovacs ASA
summary: Ultimovacs ASA is a Norwegian pharmaceutical company focused on developing immunotherapeutic cancer vaccines. Their lead product candidate, UV1, is a peptide-based vaccine designed to elicit an immune response against telomerase in cancer cells. The company is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Vaccibody AS
summary: Vaccibody AS, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, discovers and develops novel immunotherapies. The company develops vaccines for the treatment cancer and infectious diseases. Its lead product candidates include VB10.NEO, a cancer neoantigen vaccine, which is in phase I/IIa clinical trial for the treatment of melanoma, lung, head and neck, renal, and bladder; and VB10.16, a therapeutic DNA vaccine for the treatment of human papilloma virus 16 induced malignancies, such as cervical cancer. The company has clinical collaboration agreements with Roche and Nektar Therapeutics. Vaccibody AS was founded in 2007 and is based in Oslo, Norway.

name: Veidekke ASA
summary: Veidekke ASA operates as a construction and property development company. It operates through Veidekke Construction in Norway, Veidekke Infrastructure in Norway, Veidekke in Sweden, and Veidekke in Denmark/Hoffmann segments. The company operates as a construction contractor; executes civil engineering projects; and produces asphalt and aggregates, as well as operates in the public road maintenance market. It is also involved in the construction and civil engineering projects, as well as constructs commercial buildings. Veidekke ASA was founded in 1936 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Veidekke ASA
summary: Veidekke ASA is a Scandinavian construction and property development company. The company is involved in a wide range of construction projects, including buildings, infrastructure, and industrial facilities. Veidekke ASA is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Vistin Pharma ASA
summary: Vistin Pharma ASA, through its subsidiary, Vistin Pharma AS, produces and sells active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) worldwide. It offers metformin APIs and direct compressive granulates for the pharmaceutical industry. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Volue ASA
summary: Volue AS provides software and technology solutions for the energy, power grid, and infrastructure markets worldwide. It operates in three segments: Energy, Power Grid, and Infrastructure. The Energy segment enables end-to-end optimization of the green energy value-chain by offering software solutions and consulting services related to forecasting and optimization of the different energy markets. The Power Grid segment enables power distributors to support electrification of society by unlocking flexibility and digital management of the power grid. This segment also offers software solutions and consulting services. The Infrastructure segment delivers flexible solutions for digital water management consisting of software solutions and consulting services. This segment also automates processes and machines for the construction industry. It also provides solutions for the water supply, transport, offshore, maritime, and defense industries. The company was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway. Volue AS is a subsidiary of Arendals Fossekompani ASA.

name: VOW ASA
summary: VOW ASA, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies systems for processing and purifying waste water, food waste, solid waste, and bio sludge. It operates through Projects and After Sales segments. The company offers advanced wastewater purification systems to treat various types of maritime wastewater; incinerator systems for burning sludge from food waste and waste water; vacuum systems for collecting, transporting, and further processing of food waste; and waste recycling systems. It also provides waste destruction systems; custom water treatment systems; and bio-sludge system, a treatment system for sludge from waste water and food waste, and to reduce volume by dewatering and drying, as well as to disinfect. In addition, the company offers water reuse units that are used to polish and prolong the use of recreational waters; and solutions for garbage handling, waste to energy, and scrubber wash water. Further, it provides chemical products used in the wastewater purification systems; and spare parts and consumables, as well as service and operational assistance related to these products. The company sells its products to cruise liners. It has a strategic partnership agreement with Repsol, S.A. to explore applications and solutions to produce clean and renewable energy for CO2 emission reduction. The company was formerly known as Scanship Holding ASA and changed its name to VOW ASA in January 2020. VOW ASA was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway.

name: VOW ASA
summary: VOW ASA, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies systems for processing and purifying waste water, food waste, solid waste, and bio sludge. It operates through Projects and After Sales segments. The company offers advanced wastewater purification systems to treat various types of maritime wastewater; incinerator systems for burning sludge from food waste and waste water; vacuum systems for collecting, transporting, and further processing of food waste; and waste recycling systems. It also provides waste destruction systems; custom water treatment systems; and bio-sludge system, a treatment system for sludge from waste water and food waste, and to reduce volume by dewatering and drying, as well as to disinfect. The company sells its products to cruise liners. The company was formerly known as Scanship Holding ASA and changed its name to VOW ASA in January 2020. VOW ASA was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway.

name: Voss Veksel- og Landmandsbank ASA
summary: Voss Veksel- og Landmandsbank ASA provides banking products and services to private individuals and companies in Norway. The company offers saving accounts; car and other vehicle, home, small, and construction loans; overdrafts facilities; leasing services; bank guarantees; bank and payment cards; insurance products; and online and mobile banking services. The company was founded in 1843 and is based in Voss, Norway.

name: Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA
summary: Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA, together with its subsidiaries, provides roll-on roll-off (ro-ro) shipping and vehicle logistics services worldwide. It operates in two segments, Ocean and Landbased segments. The Ocean segment engages in the ocean transport of cars, and ro-ro and project cargo primarily for car manufacturers, as well as manufacturers of agriculture, and other high and heavy equipment. The Landbased segment offers vehicle logistics services, including plant and port based technical, marine terminal, and inland distribution services. The company provides its services principally under the Wallenius Wilhelmsen Ocean, Wallenius Wilhelmsen Solutions, EUKOR, ARC, and Armacup brands. It operates a fleet of 130 vessels servicing 15 trade routes. The company was founded in 1861 and is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway.

name: Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA
summary: Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA is a global shipping and logistics company specializing in transporting vehicles, rolling equipment, and breakbulk cargo. The company owns and operates a fleet of vessels and provides end-to-end logistics solutions for the automotive, construction, and agricultural industries. Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Wilson ASA
summary: Wilson ASA, a short sea company, engages in the chartering and operation of vessels in the short sea bulk sector in Europe. It operates through a fleet of 122 vessels in the range of 1500-8500 dwt. The company was founded in 1923 and is based in Bergen, Norway. Wilson ASA is a subsidiary of Caiano AS.

name: Webstep ASA
summary: Webstep ASA, together with its subsidiaries, provides information technology (IT) consultancy services to public and private businesses in Norway and Sweden. The company offers digitalization, cloud migration and integration, Internet of Things, machine learning, IT security, robotics, and analytics. Its services include tech advisory and management solutions; consulting, digitalization, .Net, Java, open source, front and back end, user experience, integration, mobility, machine learning, business intelligence, big data, data warehousing, virtual robotics, Devops, application service management, and data science services; and cloud computing, integration, sensor technology, product and service development, Beacons, enterprise user experience, web analysis, designing, Amazon Web, Azure, prediction, AI, predictive modelling, hackathon, business analysis, and search engine optimization services. The company serves banking, finance and insurance, public administration, agriculture and food production, IT and telecommunication, commerce, and transportation industries. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Webstep ASA
summary: Webstep ASA is a Norwegian IT consultancy company that provides services in areas such as digital transformation, cloud solutions, and software development. The company offers expertise to businesses across various sectors, helping them improve efficiency and innovation through technology. Webstep ASA is headquartered in Norway.

name: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA
summary: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA provides maritime products and services in Europe, the Americas, Asia, Africa, and Oceania. It operates in Maritime Services and Supply Services segments. The Maritime Services segment offers marine products, ship agency services, and logistics to the merchant fleet, as well as ship management services, including manning for various vessel types. The Supply Services segment engages in the operation of supply bases for the offshore industry; development and operation of real estate properties on and off the supply bases; and maintenance of rigs and handling of logistics related to international pipeline projects and windmill parks. The company's marine products include Unitor chemicals and equipment to clean vessels; Unitor fuel treatment chemicals; Unitor oil spill kits and other damage control solutions; Unitor cylinders; Timm ropes; Unitor equipment for the maintenance and performance vessels; and Nalfleet water treatment products to treat and protect on board systems, as well as Unicool refrigerants. It also provides marine and non-marine insurance services; and maritime training solutions. The company was founded in 1861 and is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway. Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA is a subsidiary of Tallyman AS.

name: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA
summary: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA provides maritime products and services in Europe, the Americas, Asia, Africa, and Oceania. It operates in Maritime Services and Supply Services segments. The Maritime Services segment offers marine products, ship agency services, and logistics to the merchant fleet, as well as ship management services, including manning for various vessel types. The Supply Services segment engages in the operation of supply bases for the offshore industry; development and operation of real estate properties on and off the supply bases; and maintenance of rigs and handling of logistics related to international pipeline projects and windmill parks. The company's marine products include Unitor chemicals and equipment to clean vessels; Unitor fuel treatment chemicals; Unitor oil spill kits and other damage control solutions; Unitor cylinders; Timm ropes; Unitor equipment for the maintenance and performance vessels; and Nalfleet water treatment products to treat and protect on board systems, as well as Unicool refrigerants. It also provides marine and non-marine insurance services; and maritime training solutions. The company was founded in 1861 and is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway. Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA is a subsidiary of Tallyman AS.

name: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA B
summary: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA B is a global maritime industry group headquartered in Lysaker, Norway, focusing on shipping and logistics. The company's operations include ship management, supply services, and maritime logistics solutions. They aim to shape the maritime industry through innovation, sustainability, and operational excellence.

name: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA A
summary: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA A is a global maritime industry group headquartered in Lysaker, Norway, focusing on shipping and logistics. The company's operations include ship management, supply services, and maritime logistics solutions. They aim to shape the maritime industry through innovation, sustainability, and operational excellence.

name: Xplora Technologies AS
summary: Xplora Technologies AS, an information technology company, develops wearable smart devices and services for kids and families in Norway and internationally. The company offers Xplora Service Platform, which consists of various elements, such as SIM connectivity and value-added services; IoT service that allows wearable smart devices to connect to the platform and app; and Goplay Service, a value-added service platform, which converts physical activity and location collected from IoT devices to Xplora coins. It also provides an online social community. The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: XXL ASA
summary: XXL ASA operates as a sports retailer. The company offers sports, health, and fitness products, such as sports equipment and sportswear for various sports, including football, golf, water sports, racket sports, and ice hockey; and fitness equipment, including treadmills and rowing machines, as well as food supplements and nutrition. It also provides sports-related and outdoor shoes, and shoes accessories; sportswear comprising an assortment of clothes for men, women, and children for outerwear, casual wear, sportswear and technical gear, and swimwear; and outdoor products for fishing, wilderness living, and camping, such as tents, lavvos, sleeping bags, backpacks, and cooking equipment, as well as climbing gear and equipment for horses and dogs. In addition, the company provides hunting products, including firearms and ammunition, clothes, binoculars, optics, knives, and axes; skis and ski accessories, such as shoes, poles, clothes, and other equipment for cross-country and downhill skiing, as well as snowboarding; high-end and everyday bikes comprising hybrid bikes, mountain bikes, city bikes, and electric bikes for children, women, and men; and bike equipment, such as helmets, shoes, spare parts, and clothes. Further, it offers products that connect technology and sports/outdoor activities, including sport watches, action cameras, drones, GPS, earplugs and headphones, portable loudspeakers, sunglasses, pulse meters, power banks, and cycle computers. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated approximately 90 stores, including 37 stores in Norway, 29 stores in Sweden, 17 stores in Finland, and 7 stores in Austria, as well as e-commerce websites, such as xxl.no, xxl.se, xxl.fi, xxl.dk, and xxlsports.at. XXL ASA was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: XXL ASA
summary: XXL ASA is a Norwegian sports retail company that offers a wide range of sports equipment, clothing, and footwear. The company operates stores across the Nordic region and online, catering to various sports and outdoor activities. XXL ASA is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Yara International ASA
summary: Yara International ASA provides environmental and industrial solutions in Norway and internationally. It operates through three segments: Sales & Marketing, New Business, and Production. The Sales & Marketing segment offers nitrogen-based fertilizers, including urea, urea ammonium nitrate, calcium ammonium nitrate, ammonium nitrate, calcium nitrate, and compound fertilizers that contain plant nutrients, such as nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, as well as foliar and fertigation solutions through micronutrients. It also offers urea and phosphates used as raw materials for feed products in both agriculture and aquaculture; and ammonia, urea, and nitric acid used as input factors for a large range of products and applications. This segment sells its products to distributors, as well as directly to farmers and co-operatives. The New Business segment focuses on developing, commercializing, and scaling up of profitable businesses; and delivers equipment and services to store or handle products. It also provides solution of reagents, technology, and service for NOx abatement for industrial plants, and transport at land and sea. The Production segment produces ammonia, fertilizers, and industrial products. It is also involved in the operation of phosphate mines; trade and shipping of ammonia; and sale of fertilizers; as well as provides logistics services. The company provides its products under the YaraBela, YaraLiva, YaraMila, YaraTera, YaraVera, and YaraVita brands. The company was founded in 1905 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Yara International ASA
summary: Yara International is a Norwegian chemical company that produces nitrogen-based mineral fertilizers and related industrial products. The company's products are used in agriculture and various industrial applications. Yara International is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Zalaris ASA
summary: Zalaris ASA provides full-service outsourced personnel and payroll services. The company operates through two segments, Managed Services and Professional Services. It offers a range of payroll and human resource (HR) outsourcing services, including payroll processing, time and attendance, and travel expenses, as well as cloud-based HR functionality services, such as talent management, digital personnel archive, HR analytics, mobile solutions, etc. The company also provides consulting services. It serves retail, bank and insurance, offshore and energy, infrastructure, transportation, technology, services, and health industries. Zalaris ASA has operations in Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Germany, Latvia, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Zalaris HR Services AS and changed its name to Zalaris ASA in May 2014. Zalaris ASA was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Zaptec AS
summary: Zaptec AS designs, develops, and produces smart EV charging systems in Norway. It offers ZAPTEC Pro, a charging station for parking spaces in housing cooperatives and co-ownership properties, companies, and newbuilds; ZAPTEC Home, a charging station for electric cars at homes; and charging columns for outdoor installations. The company also provides ZAPTEC Portal, a solution that monitors, balances, and optimizes the load between the various charging stations; and ZAPTEC APM, which measures the power consumption for the entire building and automatically allocates power to EV charging, as well as offers support services. It provides charging solutions for homes, multi-family houses, public charging facilities, businesses, and real estate developers. Zaptec AS was founded in 2012 and is based in Stavanger, Norway.

name: Zenith Energy Ltd.
summary: Zenith Energy Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, explores for and develops oil and natural gas in Italy, the Republic of the Congo, and internationally. It also produces and sells electricity and condensate. The company was formerly known as Canoel International Energy Ltd. and changed its name to Zenith Energy Ltd. in October 2014. Zenith Energy Ltd. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Calgary, Canada.

name: Zwipe AS
summary: Zwipe AS provides biometric payment cards components and wearables technology that enable consumers to authorize transactions with their fingerprints without compromising their privacy. The company provides biometric payment platform, a solution for payment cards; biometric enrolment tablet for mobile registration and authentication of biometric cards by card issuers; and a wearable device for the tokenization of payment applications blended with biometrics. It operates in Norway and internationally. Zwipe AS has a collaboration with Idemia, a disruptive payment platform. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
